div1.entryFree: Interchange, vb. to exchange, to give and receive mutually: they i. each other's seat, Lucr. 70. --d love-tokens with my child, Mids. I, 1, 29. two bosoms --d, II, 2, 49 (Qq interchained). --ing blows, H6A IV, 6, 19. Rom. I, 1, 120. I shall i. my waned state for Henry's regal crown, H6C IV, 7, 3.
